note: All 5 models converged on the same structural problems (rare). Gemini uniquely caught GRPO vs DPO mismatch (99% confidence). Grok proposed best pragmatic alternative (feedback tool, 200 LoC). Codex had most precise schema analysis. Kimi found 5 specific labeling failure modes. DeepSeek-r1 was balanced but less unique. However, all models missed the meta-layer insight (conversation IS the trajectory) — user had to point it out.
